title: Senior Software Engineer - AgroStar - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - AgroStar - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
AgroStar invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About AgroStar:
AgroStar is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AgroStar!
